name: URL Shortener API
description: Create short URLs with custom aliases and track click statistics. Fast, reliable URL shortening powered by Cloudflare's edge network.

endpoints.name: Create Short URL
endpoints.description: Shorten a long URL with an optional custom alias

endpoints.name: Get Statistics
endpoints.description: Get click count, creation date, and last clicked timestamp

long_description:
## Overview

Create short URLs with custom aliases and track click statistics. A fast, reliable Bitly alternative powered by Cloudflare's edge network. Features 301 redirects, click analytics, and custom alias support.

## Key Features

- ✅ Create short URLs with optional custom aliases
- ✅ Click tracking with count, creation date, and last-clicked timestamp
- ✅ Fast 301 redirects via Cloudflare edge network
- ✅ Delete short URLs when no longer needed
- ✅ No expiration on created links

## Use Cases

- **Marketing Campaigns**: Track click-through rates on shortened links
- **Social Media**: Create clean, branded short URLs for posts
- **Email Marketing**: Shorten long URLs and measure engagement
- **QR Codes**: Pair with QR codes for trackable offline-to-online campaigns
- **Internal Tools**: Shorten internal documentation and resource links

## Quick Start

```
POST /shorten
Content-Type: application/json

{"url": "https://example.com/very/long/path", "alias": "my-link"}
```

Returns the short URL. Use `GET /stats/{alias}` to view click analytics.

## Pricing

| Plan | Price | Requests/day | Rate Limit |
|------|-------|-------------|------------|
| **Basic (FREE)** | $0 | 100 | 1/sec |
| Pro | $5 | 10,000 | 10/sec |

Free tier includes all features. No credit card required.
